articles.description: The Lok Sabha on Monday passed the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (Amendment) Bill, 2025'' as reported by the Select Committee. The Bill seeks to further amend the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.

topStories.title: 'False Narrative By Congress, Left': Kiren Rijiju On Foreign Funding Row
topStories.description: The FCRA Amendment Bill showdown is set to become a key flashpoint between the Congress, the Left government, and the BJP as each jostles to win the April Assembly election.

topStories.title: Did Israel miscalculate in launching the war on Iran?
topStories.description: Like in other conflicts, Israel launched the war on Iran together with the US without a realistic political plan.

topStories.title: Trump's Ballroom With 'Stairs To Nowhere' Red-Flagged By Architects
topStories.description: Trump has outlined plans for the new White House ballroom, saying the project will address space constraints during official events and feature bulletproof and drone-resistant design elements.

topStories.title: 3 Trump Allies In Greenland And A 'Covert Op' Mystery
topStories.description: Trump has made plain his desire to assert US dominance over the Western hemisphere, of which Greenland is an integral part. But in the case of the Danish territory, his fight is against a NATO ally.

topStories.title: US-Israel-Iran War Disrupts Global Drug Supply Chains Severely
topStories.description: The ongoing US-Israel-Iran war is disrupting global medicine supply chains, affecting cancer drugs, insulin and essential aid. WHO warns of delays, rising costs and risks for vulnerable nations across...

topStories.title: Vijay follows footsteps of Tamil Nadu politicians with a penchant for dual contests
topStories.description: TVK leader to contest two urban seats in debut election; precedent set by Jayalalithaa, who once contested four seats; PT, DMK, Congress leaders have also attempted dual contests, with less than stellar results

dailyNews.title: AI war in Iran has brought conflict to Silicon Valley. No one is ready
dailyNews.description: Iran published a 29-location target list naming Amazon, Microsoft, Google, Nvidia and Palantir, then struck AWS data centers in the UAE and Bahrain.

dailyNews.title: More and more Gen Z women say they don’t want kids. As a young mom, here’s what they get wrong
dailyNews.description: As a Gen Z mom, I've found motherhood's challenges yield more joy than sacrifice—despite social media's DINK glamorization discouraging young women.

dailyNews.title: Interactive tool reveals which states stand to lose billions in education funding
dailyNews.description: An interactive tool from the America First Policy Institute reveals how states could miss billions in education funding and millions of scholarships by opting out.

dailyNews.title: Dem senator warns deportation could let Virginia woman's illegal immigrant killer 'escape accountability'
dailyNews.description: Sen. Tim Kaine says Abdul Jalloh, charged with murdering Stephanie Minter in Virginia, should be fully prosecuted before any deportation to ensure accountability.

dailyNews.title: US allows Russian oil tanker to reach Cuba amid blockade as Trump says island ‘has to survive’
dailyNews.description: The U.S. is reportedly allowing a Russian oil tanker to reach Cuba as President Donald Trump eases pressure on the island, saying countries "needs to survive."

dailyNews.title: Lionel Richie issues warning to rude celebrities after Chappell Roan backlash
dailyNews.description: Lionel Richie warns rising stars to embrace fan support, saying fame without people "doesn't work," amid Chappell Roan's Brazil fan incident controversy.

dailyNews.title: Trump claims donor funded White House ballroom includes hidden build below with security focus
dailyNews.description: A $400 million White House ballroom approved by the Commission of Fine Arts will include an underground complex, Trump says, funded by private donors.

dailyNews.title: 'Lion King' composer sues comedian for $27M over 'Circle of Life' joke
dailyNews.description: Zimbabwean comedian Learnmore Jonasi was accused by South African composer Lebo M of making false statements about the opening chant in Disney's "The Lion King."

dailyNews.title: Trump dominates CPAC poll as conservatives rally behind agenda, back Iran action
dailyNews.description: A new CPAC survey finds strong conservative backing for Trump's agenda, with 91% supporting tariffs and 89% backing military action in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Rob Schneider proposes military draft, urges Americans to 'recommit' to traditional values
dailyNews.description: Actor Rob Schneider invoked a JFK quote on X while calling for restoring the military draft, urging every American to serve two years of service at 18.

dailyNews.title: Rand Paul says he's '50-50' on running for president in 2028, 'thinking about it'
dailyNews.description: Sen. Rand Paul, R-Ky., told "CBS News Sunday Morning" that he is "50-50" on a possible 2028 presidential run based on his opposition to the war against Iran.

dailyNews.title: 'No Kings’ protesters debut rewrite of ‘America the Beautiful’ verse to include 'thy immigrant'
dailyNews.description: Protesters in Washington, D.C., sang rewritten lyrics to “America the Beautiful" during a “No Kings" rally, as tensions over ICE enforcement and the DHS funding standoff continue.

topStories.description: Transportation safety officers are set to be paid on Monday, but Tom Homan, the White House’s border czar, said ICE agents may stay where there are shortages.

topStories.description: The group, Innovation Council Action, says it plans to spend at least $100 million. It will be led by a former administration official.

topStories.description: The One Big Beautiful Bill Act will add red tape and restrictions for those seeking Medicaid and SNAP benefits. And the costs to update computer systems that determine eligibility for those programs will be steep.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he has "no problem" with Russian tanker bringing oil to Cuba
dailyNews.description: When asked if a New York Times report that the tanker would be allowed to reach Cuba was true, Mr. Trump said: "If a country wants to send some oil into Cuba right now, I have no problem whether it's Russia or not."

dailyNews.title: Trump administration scaling back asylum crackdown, sources say
dailyNews.description: The unprecedented move amounted to an indefinite suspension of all asylum requests filed outside of immigration court, regardless of the applicant's nationality.

dailyNews.title: Trump sends mixed messages on Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump has repeatedly claimed, including as recently as this weekend, that the war in Iran has been won. Still, he insists that Iran also wants to negotiate as more troops head to the Middle East. Cristian Benavides has more.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he wants Iran's oil and could seize Kharg Island
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said Sunday that he would like to "take the oil in Iran" and is considering seizing the export hub of Kharg Island, which is responsible for more than 90% of Iran's oil exports

dailyNews.title: Looking to limit birthright citizenship, Trump turns to an 1884 ruling against a Native American man
dailyNews.description: Defending birthright citizenship changes, President Donald Trump's administration is citing an 1884 Supreme Court case called Elk v. Wilkins about voting rights for a Native American man.

dailyNews.title: Zelenskyy asked if Trump cares about the future of Ukraine
dailyNews.description: In an interview with NBC News’ Raf Sanchez, President Zelenskyy says that he hopes President Trump cares about the future of Ukraine, but “they care about the United States more.”

dailyNews.title: Russian oil tanker reportedly arrives in Cuba after Trump softens approach to U.S. blockade
dailyNews.description: His comments come as a Russian-flagged oil tanker, the sanctioned Anatoly Kolodkin, makes its way to the fuel-starved Caribbean country.

dailyNews.title: Trump reportedly wants to 'take the oil in Iran' as Tehran targets water, power facilities in Kuwait
dailyNews.description: The Middle East conflict has entered its fifth week, with attacks expanding across the region and raising risks to energy and infrastructure.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan prepared to host U.S.-Iran talks in 'coming days' as Trump weighs deploying ground troops
dailyNews.description: Foreign ministers of Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, Turkey and Egypt all arrived in Islamabad to discuss the evolving regional situation in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: How the big oil and gas CEOs think the Iran war supply disruption will play out
dailyNews.description: The oil industry's grim outlook for global oil and gas supplies stands in contrast to the Trump administration's promise that the disruption is short term.

dailyNews.title: Trump ban on investor homebuying may come at cost of a bigger real estate deal
dailyNews.description: President Trump's plan to ban big investors from home ownership may not be the key to reviving the American Dream in affordable housing legislation.

dailyNews.title: Not everyone can expect a bigger tax refund this year — what's actually driving your result
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has said this will be the "largest tax refund season of all time," as a result of his "big beautiful bill." Here's what the megabill means for taxpayers.
